MINI MINUTES: Judge Ellen Chaitin.; Clerk: N. Bautista ; Not Reported. (D514)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic, is present. Represented by Winefred Statleman
Attorney, Paul Hogarth, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Tomeisha Michael, is present.
Attorney, Ming Chung , representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Tom Drohan, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 504B, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
This case settled, the trial date of MAR-07-2011 is vacated.
